blocks.content: The tower was enormous, and in the small village on the 387th floor,
about 80 people lived.
Inside a small hut, a woman who had been in a deep sleep slowly opened her eyes.
Ivory Tower resident, Bipa.
In High Gear, she was a tutorial manager using the gear mark.

blocks.speaker: Bipa
blocks.content: What's the point of a meeting?
She had no intention of attending.
Nevertheless, the reason she logged out was because Yahweh's actions had moved her heart.
As she stepped out of the hut, other residents looked at her in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Resident
blocks.content: Bipa? What's going on? You're coming outside?

blocks.speaker: Bipa
blocks.content: What's the situation?
The residents squinted their eyes but couldn't avoid revealing the significant event.

blocks.speaker: Resident
blocks.content: See for yourself.
When they reached the outer wall they pointed to, the holographic curtain disappeared, revealing a mechanical iron wall.
At the 387th floor of the Ivory Tower, even the blizzards raging in the North Pole were beneath them.
She looked through the window.
At the horizon, flames that evaporated the cold were blazing in the Kingdom of Corona.

blocks.speaker: Bipa
blocks.content: Demons.
Click. Click.
Her pupils rotated like a camera aperture, zooming in on the scene of the Kingdom of Corona.
She saw the stars of the Ivory Tower and, among them, a demon swordsman slaughtering numerous soldiers.
The army of hell, led by the first legion commander, Baal.

blocks.speaker: Bipa
blocks.content: They've finally come.
The fact that the only legion commander who hadn't opened the demon realm was targeting the North Pole was significant.

blocks.speaker: Bipa
blocks.content: Deadly Cross. That was probably the name.
They intended to bring down the Ivory Tower.
Kashan. Aganos.
As Uorin, who had logged out of High Gear, left the bedroom, Gando bowed his head.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: You've arrived.
It was surprising and welcoming since she had been fully immersed in High Gear, neglecting state affairs.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Is there anything special you need?

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: No.
Uorin smiled as she passed Gando.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's over. I've obtained everything I could from High Gear. How long until the Holy War?

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: Three days.
Gando followed behind, asking.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: If you've obtained everything…
Walking side by side, Uorin's face turned cold as if nothing had happened.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's been a while since I felt this way.
As Gando swallowed hard, Uorin's thoughts deepened.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Minus universe.
Although not everything, Fermi had provided a general overview as agreed.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: This could be the worst Holy War ever. No, perhaps this is our last…
Uorin stopped walking.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Gando, I will participate in the Holy War.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: Understood.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Don't be too disappointed. The survivors, forces, and kingdoms after the Great Purge, and the monsters, will all gather. It seems too much for you to handle alone.
Gando trembled with emotion, grateful that she considered his feelings.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: It's the Empress's empire.
A faint smile appeared on Uorin's lips but quickly turned cold.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I will never give it up,

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Call Kido.
Southern Continent, Kessia.
Since most of the citizens were intoxicated with Angel, there weren't many shops open for business.
The place Shirone chose for the meeting was a franchise café run by Golden Wheel.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: Welcome.
As he opened the door and entered, a dazed-looking employee greeted Shirone.
He saw tables where nobles were seated, seemingly also under the influence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The problem is…
The group sitting in the corner of the shop didn't look much different.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is quite a sight.
Five High Gear operators had gathered for this meeting, and none made eye contact.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was the expected scene, given that they were socially inept individuals, but it was still extreme.

blocks.speaker: Lollipop
blocks.content: Oh? Could it be…?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yahweh?

blocks.speaker: Lollipop
blocks.content: Lollipop?
He knew some details about the operators but didn't reveal their real names.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow, it's just like High Gear. Welcome. The atmosphere here is a total disaster.
Even with Shirone's arrival, the operators didn't even glance his way and continued their aimless actions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's the lollipop.
The middle-aged man with a hunched back and a beard was probably Smile Mark.
The thin woman with long hair seemed to be Black Circle Mark.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And the other two…
The ones who caused trouble in High Gear, Operator and Number Seven.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Number Seven. Is he my age?
Despite his sturdy build, his nervous leg shaking revealed his personality.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The operator sitting at the head of the table kept brushing her bangs with her hand.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Ugh. Seriously.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She must be worried about his acne.
Shirone guessed the reason the operator's bangs covered her eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright then.
Sitting across from them, Shirone ordered tea from the employee and began to speak.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Nice to meet you all. I'm Shirone.
No one responded, and Smile Mark turned his head as if he was about to say something.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They really lack social skills. No opinions at all. How are we supposed to work together like this?
They had to.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: These were the developers of High Gear, who had achieved unprecedented success in Under Coder.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The world's best coders.

blocks.speaker: Lollipop
blocks.content: Let's start with introductions. This is customary at in-person gatherings. I'm Lollipop. In High Gear, I handle impact and collision processing.
It was a position requiring sharp reflexes.

blocks.speaker: Smile Mark
blocks.content: Well, should I go next? Uh… they call me Smile Mark. I'm in charge of…

blocks.speaker: Black Circle
blocks.content: Black Circle. I manage the meta processor.
By the time it was Number Seven's turn, he seemed like he was suffering from a speech impediment, barely able to gather his thoughts.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: Your turn, big brother,
Oh. Uh…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't worry, just speak casually. It's just introductions.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: Uh, well… um…
Number Seven snapped to attention but kept stealing glances at the Operator seated at the head of the table.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What's with all the sneaking looks? Disappointed? Am I too ugly for you?

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: W-what? Who said that? You're absolutely stunning!
He startled himself with his outburst, then bowed his head in embarrassment while the Operator calmly sipped her drink through a straw.
A long, awkward silence followed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well… introductions are done for now.
Shirone pivoted quickly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This gathering was my suggestion to the Operator. As some of you may already know, going forward, the Operator will assist me in a project in the real world.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What project?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This statement piqued the administrators' interest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What project?
Shirone explained their strategy for mining the Apocalypse from The Abyss's Domain.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle
blocks.content: Hmm… a cytoplasmic calcification program. To inject it into the main system, you'd need to know the terminal patterns.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: We could use AI. Deploy massive excavation creatures to map the area in three dimensions and…

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: But the time it takes to breach the firewall is critical.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: If we embed invasion codes into the program…
The previously silent administrators now erupted into passionate discussions, almost like a heated debate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone smiled faintly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Their bodies may be in the real world, but their minds are still entrenched in the virtual realm of Under Coder.
Leaning her chin on her hand, the Operator raised a finger.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Anyway, as I was saying… I agreed to help Shirone. What about you guys?
The administrators exchanged glances before Number Seven slowly raised his hand.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: Ugh, I guess I'm obligated, huh?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: No. Attending this meeting was the only requirement. If you don't want to, you're free to opt out.
When he started lowering his hand, she cut him off with a sharp remark.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Just kidding. After all the mess you caused, you think you can leave it like this? You've got thousands of tons to weld back together.
Her unexpected joke brought a smile to Number Seven's face.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: Hah! Like anyone else could handle it. Without me, there's no way you're digging up the Apocalypse!

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: That's true.
That's true,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright, shall we get to work?
The Middle East, Paras Kingdom
The Paras Kingdom had suffered significant damage during the world war initiated by the Gustav Empire.
The most devastating blow was the death of King Kasartak, who had ruled Paras for 40 years.
However, as the cradle of ancient civilizations, the powerful Middle Eastern nation would not fall so easily.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: It's time to depart.
In the ornate Grand Hall of the royal palace Delayma, a gentle yet resonant voice echoed.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Your Majesty, preparations are complete. This Holy War will solidify Paras as the ruling power of the world.
His ministers had absolute faith in him.
Ascending the throne at a young age, Kitra's intellect made him the perfect ruler for a kingdom that prided itself on its ancient wisdom.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Hmm…
The serpent coiled around Kitra's neck flicked its tongue toward the gathered ministers, silencing them.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Summon Zulu.
The ministers hesitated, their heads snapping up.

blocks.speaker: Minister
blocks.content: Your Majesty, with all due respect, the ancient civilization of Paras has never granted access to foreigners—
Hiss!
The snake let out a sharp, vibrating sound, causing the ministers' faces to pale.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Shh.
Kitra softly shushed the snake, which then turned its head to lick him affectionately.
As he savored the venom like a kiss, Kitra repeated his order.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Bring Zulu.
A soldier rushed out of the Grand Hall.
Shortly after, the doors opened to reveal Zulu, Shirone, Canis, and Arin entering together.
Zulu, with a pacifier in her mouth, knelt before the king, making soft sucking noises.

blocks.speaker: Zulu
blocks.content: You summoned me, Your Majesty.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Zulu…
Zulu was not only Paras's pride but also the mage beloved by the late Kasartak.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: It brings back memories. My father adored you, and I once called you aunty. I can't help but wonder—did you despise him so much that you couldn't even send a message?
Zulu's pacifier made a quiet popping sound as she continued sucking, her expression devoid of any emotion.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She's beautiful.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone wondered if relentless abuse from infancy had twisted him into something so haunting.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: So, you wish to explore the Pyramid of Truth?

blocks.speaker: Zulu
blocks.content: Yes, Your Majesty. My companions and I aim to uncover the secrets of the outside world there.
Kitra's gaze shifted past Zulu to Shirone and his companions, lingering particularly on Shirone.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: The Five Stars of the Ivory Tower… I apologize for keeping you waiting. As you know, domestic affairs have been pressing.
Unlike most rulers who feigned courage before stars of renown, Kitra's sincerity was evident.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Such a unique presence. This Holy War will be intense.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Opening a national treasure requires great determination. Please grant us this for the sake of humanity.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: Humanity, hmm…
Kitra crossed his legs casually.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: They say the Burning Demon Realm has dried up all the oases. Without you, the damage would have been worse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're too kind.
As if indulging in a formality, Kitra didn't drag it out.

blocks.speaker: King Kitra
blocks.content: I grant you permission.
As murmurs spread among the ministers, Canis and Arin's tense expressions relaxed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's done.
The ancient civilization's secrets would finally be unveiled.
